name: elephantopin
summary: Sesquiterpene lactone associated with inflammatory signaling control.
description: Elephantopin, a sesquiterpene lactone, is associated with regulation of inflammatory signaling cascades that can influence stress-response transcription.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
dosage: standardized extract or essential-oil-free preparation when oral use is intended
typical_dosage: standardized extract or essential-oil-free preparation when oral use is intended
